source: Figma — Claude Design System, Changelog page (Entries frame 762:40)
note: Generated from the Figma changelog. Do not hand-edit — regenerate via the extraction snippet in CLAUDE.md whenever the Figma changelog changes, so this stays in sync.

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Merged branch changelog-layout-rules into main (commit 7a409b4): updated the CLAUDE.md changelog rules to codify the new entry layout — no Spacer layers, 12px vertical padding + 12px itemSpacing gap, and no bottom stroke/divider — so all future entries stay consistent with the cleaned-up changelog.

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Changelog layout cleanup: removed all manual Spacer layers (133 across every entry), set each Entry frame to 12px vertical padding and a 12px itemSpacing gap, and removed the bottom stroke/divider from every entry. All 72 entries now share one consistent rhythm with no dividers; completes the move from spacer frames to itemSpacing.

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Projects screen (Live Github Demo page): set the four owner Avatars to the per-name colors the live Avatar component actually renders — Sarah Chen green, Marcus Webb violet, Priya Patel red, James Okafor cyan — instead of the component default indigo, so the Figma mock matches the deployed page. Code was already correct (Avatar hashes the name to a palette colour); no code change.

sections.label: SCREENS
bullets: Merged branch demo-projects-figma-edit into main (commit ea6b773): ported a Figma edit back to code — removed the "Onboarding Flow" row from the /demo/projects table (now 4 projects; the "N total" count updates automatically). Completes a code → Figma → code round-trip for the Projects screen.

sections.label: SCREENS
bullets: Merged branch demo-projects-page into main (commit eb48e35): added a new /demo/projects screen — a projects table (owner Avatar, status Badge, due date) built entirely from the design system, plus the Projects nav item + route and table styles in demo.css. Deployed live at /#/demo/projects.

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Merged branch docs-ai-ready-section into main (commit e2cf91e): added an "AI-ready by design" section to the docs home page (src/pages/Home.jsx) — Discoverable / Addressable / Verifiable cards covering the machine-readable manifests, the Figma↔code map, and the self-checking CI guards, reusing the existing benefit-card styles.
Rewrote the "For AI assistants" section of BENEFITS.md to match the same three-pillar framing (Discoverable / Addressable / Verifiable).

sections.label: SCREENS
bullets: Built out the "Onboarding Flow Demo" page: three onboarding flow concepts, each a labeled row of four mobile screens. Copy, feature highlights, and the interest options all onboard to the Acme Corp product shown on the Annotation Demo page (dashboard metrics, Projects, Analytics, Messages, Files, Calendar). Screens use fixed-height media/title/subtitle zones, top-anchored so content begins at a consistent top edge, with the CTA + progress dots pinned to the bottom — so nothing shifts as you step through. Wireframe fidelity — grey image placeholders, outlined inputs, pill buttons — not built from the live design-system components.

Flow 1 (Feature walkthrough), Flow 2 (Sign-up & setup), and Flow 3 (Personalization) each include a create-account step and share one visual language; the per-screen copy differentiates how they sequence account creation, so they read as alternative onboarding paths for the same product.

sections.label: TOKENS
bullets: Merged branch revert-surface-overlay-opacity into main (commit f474e3d): color/surface-overlay opacity reverted to 60% in tokens.css, tokens.json, and figma-tokens.snapshot.json.

sections.label: TOKENS
bullets: Reverted color/surface-overlay from 65% back to 60% opacity in both Light and Dark modes (rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.6)); change staged on branch revert-surface-overlay-opacity for later merge.

sections.label: TOKENS
bullets: Committed token update to design-system-demo repo (commit 4d5c0bc): color/surface-overlay opacity 60% → 65% in tokens.css, tokens.json, and figma-tokens.snapshot.json.

sections.label: TOKENS
bullets: Updated color/surface-overlay from 60% to 65% opacity in both Light and Dark modes (rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.65)); synced tokens.css and tokens.json to match.

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Documented the live demo in AGENTS.md — a “Live demo” section covering the /#/demo and /#/demo/settings routes, their full-width/no-sidebar + hamburger behavior, the public URL, and where the code lives, so a fresh session gets oriented to the client-facing demo

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Annotation component: hid the placeholder icon box (it rendered an empty circle for every asset) so the Assets & Icons section reads as a clean labeled list; tidied the demo annotations’ filler rows (Stat Cards now shows “No icons”; removed the “(none)” rows on Profile Form and Preferences)
Added a shadow/focus-error token (light red @12%, dark red-400 @15%, mirroring shadow/focus-subtle) for the input error focus ring; the toggle handle now uses shadow/sm
With these, component CSS has zero hardcoded values — the check:hardcoded guard reports 0 errors and 0 warnings

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Moved the project conventions into the repo — CLAUDE.md (Figma changelog/annotation rules + agent-skills config) and docs/agents now live in design-system-demo alongside AGENTS.md, with the fingerprint-script path made repo-relative; this retires the separate config repo

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Renamed the repo design-system-docs → design-system-demo and updated the hardcoded GitHub/Pages URLs, package name, and clone instructions; the Vite base path auto-derives from the repo name, so the live demo moved to https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Set the Demo screen annotation cards to a consistent 32px gap from the frames they annotate (panel edge to frame edge); the dashed connectors stretch to keep their anchor dots on each component
Added a shadow/focus-error token (light red @12%, dark red-400 @15%, mirroring shadow/focus-subtle) for the input error focus ring; the toggle handle now uses shadow/sm
With these, component CSS has zero hardcoded values — the check:hardcoded guard reports 0 errors and 0 warnings

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Replaced the Demo screens’ bespoke callouts with instances of the rebuilt Annotation component, populated with real specs, token rows (with DS-bound swatches), icons, code, and dev notes
Dashboard: Navbar, Stat Cards, Activity Card · Account Settings: Navbar, Profile Form, Preferences — connectors point at each component via the Direction/Line variants and an extended dashed line

sections.label: COMPONENTS
bullets: Rebuilt the Annotation component natively in this file (new Annotations page) — a 6-variant set (Direction=Left/Right × Line=Top/Center/Bottom) whose connector (dashed line, anchor dot, terminator) repositions per variant via child order + constraints + counter-axis alignment

Panel is bound to this design system’s own variables (bg/default, text/default, text/muted, text/disabled, border/default, interactive/primary, indigo/100, radius/sm-md-lg) with sections for Component Specs, Color & Tokens, Assets & Icons, and Dev Handoff; the pink connector accent stays literal (no DS pink token)

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Annotated the Demo Dashboard — Navbar, Page Header, Stat Cards, and Activity Card (Tabs + Badge) — with callout panels (component/section, props, tokens, dev notes) and pink dashed connectors
Annotated the Demo Account Settings — Navbar, Profile Form (Input/Select), Preferences (Toggle/Checkbox), and Form Actions (Buttons) — with the same callout panels and connectors

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Extended visual-regression coverage to the demo: the Dashboard and Account Settings at desktop width, plus the mobile top bar (collapsed) and the open hamburger drawer at 390px — Linux baselines committed, so the flagship demo and its responsive nav are protected against regressions

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: The demo nav now collapses into a hamburger drawer at ≤768px — a sticky top bar with the brand and a toggle that slides the sidebar in as an off-canvas drawer over a dimmed overlay (closes on overlay tap, toggle, or navigation) — replacing the cramped horizontal scrolling top bar

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: The demo Account Settings “Cancel” button now restores the form fields and preference toggles to their initial values (with a “Changes discarded” toast) instead of being a no-op

sections.label: TOKENS
bullets: Added --color-interactive-on-inverse (light indigo-400 / dark indigo-600) for link/action text on the inverse surface, and extended the check:contrast guard to enforce it — closing the gap that let a too-dark brand link on the dark toast slip past CI (now AA in both modes: 4.9:1 light, 5.74:1 dark)

sections.label: COMPONENTS
bullets: Demo dashboard: the activity-row avatars now show real initials (SC, MW, PP, JO) instead of the placeholder “JB”, matching the names

Toast: the Success/Error/Warning/Info variants now use per-type glyph icons (Circle-Check, Octagon-Exclamation, Triangle-Exclamation, Circle-Info) in place of plain colored dots, matching the live demo’s checkmark style

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Made the demo pages responsive (mirroring the Layout page breakpoints): at ≤768px the sidebar becomes a horizontal top bar and dashboard stats drop to 2 columns; at ≤480px stats go single-column, margins tighten to 16px, and the page header and name fields stack

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Fixed the Action toast’s “Undo” link contrast on the new dark background: it used color/text/brand (indigo/600 #4F46E5) at 2.3:1, failing WCAG AA
Added a toast/text/action token (→ indigo/400 #818CF8) and bound the Undo link to it, raising contrast to 4.9:1 — AA-compliant for normal text

sections.label: COMPONENTS
bullets: Redefined the toast colour tokens to the inverse scheme — toast/bg → surface-inverse, toast/text/title & toast/text/body → text/on-inverse, toast/close/color → text/disabled — so toasts are dark with light text like the live demo

Restyled the Toast component: visible toast/bg fill, rounded corners (toast/radius, 8px), the Shadow/lg effect style, and a 16px icon — it now renders as a dark pill instead of a square, transparent, shadowless box

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Account Settings now fires a success Toast after the user clicks Save changes, replacing the always-visible inline Alert; the Figma settings screen no longer shows a standing alert

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Tab: increased padding to 10×16px (from 4×12px, horizontal bound to spacing/4) so tabs are less cramped and match the live demo

Dashboard activity card: switched to uniform 24px padding so the tab row’s bottom border is inset to the content width instead of stretching edge-to-edge, and added a 16px gap below the section header and 40px before the activity list

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Synced the demo to Figma: the dashboard activity card now shows 4 tabs (Active users, Sessions, Page views, Events), and the Account Settings success alert is shown by default (dismissible, re-shown on save)

sections.label: COMPONENTS
bullets: Tab: the active state now renders its purple underline indicator (a 2px bar pinned to the bottom edge) and a purple active label, so the selected tab is clearly marked
TabGroup: added a bottom border (color/border/default) beneath the tab row

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Demo nav placeholders (everything except Dashboard and Profile) are now inert instead of linking back to the docs site, and the demo opens with the browser tab titled "Live Demo"

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Removed icons from the live demo nav items so the code matches the Figma demo navbar (NavItem ShowIcon is off), keeping the demo text-only

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: The "View live demo" CTA on the docs homepage now opens /#/demo in a new tab, keeping the design system docs available in the original tab

sections.label: SCREENS
bullets: Built two example product screens on the new Demo page — Dashboard and Account Settings — composed entirely from design system components (Navbar, Button, Tabs, Badge, Input, Select, Toggle, Checkbox, Alert)
Aligned both Demo screens to the documented Layout grid — 240px sidebar plus 1200px content area, 24px margins and 24px gutters
Implemented the demo in code at /#/demo and /#/demo/settings: full-width shell (no docs sidebar), a "View live demo" CTA on the docs homepage, and cross-navigation through the demo Navbar

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Tokenized the remaining on-scale component spacing (4px → --spacing-xs, 24px → --spacing-2xl in Card, Checkbox, Radio)
Extended the check:hardcoded guard to spacing: padding/margin/gap values fully on the spacing scale now fail the build, off-scale micro-values (1-2px nudges, tight badge padding) warn
Component CSS is now fully tokenized across colours, type, shadows, and spacing

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Snapped the 7 off-scale component font-sizes onto the type scale (10/11px → xs, 13px → sm, 15px → md): avatar initials, badge sm/lg, card description, nav-item badge, navbar brand + section label
Added a shadow/focus-error token (light red @12%, dark red-400 @15%, mirroring shadow/focus-subtle) for the input error focus ring; the toggle handle now uses shadow/sm
With these, component CSS has zero hardcoded values — the check:hardcoded guard reports 0 errors and 0 warnings

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Tokenized component CSS so components consume the design tokens instead of bypassing them: the Modal scrim now uses --color-surface-overlay, and 27 on-scale font-sizes were replaced with --font-size-* tokens (identical px, no visual change)

Added a check:hardcoded CI guard: hardcoded hex colours and on-scale font-size px in component CSS now fail the build, off-scale sizes and raw rgba() warn — the code-side mirror of the Figma "everything aliased" work

sections.label: TOKENS
bullets: Added a dedicated color/border/input token (light → slate/400 #94A3B8, dark → slate/500 #64748B) and pointed the input & select borders at it

This is a deliberate middle ground between the original light border and the full-AA neutral one — lighter, less utilitarian look while still far clearer than before (light ~2.6:1, up from 1.5:1; dark ~3.8:1, which passes AA)
The contrast guard now reports the input border as an advisory note rather than an enforced 3:1 — a documented design tradeoff

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Accessibility (WCAG AA): darkened the light-mode status icon colours so they meet the 3:1 non-text contrast minimum on their tinted backgrounds — color/feedback/success light → emerald/600 (#059669), color/feedback/warning light → amber/700 (#B45309)
Dark mode was already compliant and is unchanged
In the repo: input & select borders moved to the neutral token for a 3:1 boundary, and a new check:contrast guard now audits every text/UI pairing (light + dark) in CI

sections.label: TOKENS
bullets: Expanded the primitive colour ramps to the full Tailwind scale (50–950): added 23 shades — slate/950, indigo/950, and the missing emerald, amber, and red steps (100–300, 600–800, 950)
Re-aliased every semantic colour to a primitive in both light and dark modes (29 raw values converted across this and the prior pass); editing a primitive now propagates everywhere
Snapped color/feedback/warning-bg dark from a custom #431407 to standard amber/950 (#451A03) so it aligns to the scale — a near-imperceptible change to the dark warning background
Only color/surface-overlay remains a raw value — it is a translucent scrim (slate-900 @ 60%), which cannot alias an opaque primitive

sections.label: TOKENS
bullets: Consistency fix: converted 19 raw colour values across 14 Color variables to primitive aliases (both light and dark) — semantic colours now reference primitives wherever a matching one exists, so editing a primitive propagates everywhere
Affected: border/default, border/strong, feedback success/warning/error (text & borders), and info bg/border/icon/text
Resolved colours are unchanged (aliased to same-value primitives); only the internal referencing improved
A few dark-mode tints (e.g. success-bg #022C22, error #F87171, primary-fg #1E1B4B) have no matching primitive in the ramps, so they remain raw values

sections.label: TOKENS
bullets: Added 5 semantic colour variables to the Color collection (light/dark, aliased to primitives): surface, surface-inverse, surface-overlay, text/disabled, text/on-inverse
Added radius/2xl (16px) to the Spacing collection
Created a new Shadows collection with Light/Dark modes holding all 7 shadows (xs, sm, md, lg, xl, focus, focus-subtle); removed the old single-mode shadow variables from the Spacing collection
These tokens were previously code-only — Figma is now the source of truth for them too (values match the repo), so nearly all design tokens live in one place (font fallback stacks remain CSS-only)

sections.label: TOKENS
bullets: Dark mode: re-pointed color/interactive/primary alias from indigo/600 to indigo/400 (#818CF8) — Figma had left it at the light value, too dark on dark backgrounds
Dark mode: re-pointed color/interactive/primary-hover to indigo/300 (#A5B4FC), keeping hover lighter than the new default
Dark mode: re-pointed color/text/default to slate/100 (#F1F5F9) to match the repo
These align Figma dark mode with the repo's better-tuned dark palette (tokens.css); the repo separately gained a color/interactive/neutral dark override (#94A3B8)

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Color page: rounded and bound 95 off-scale spacing values (6px→8px on all Swatch frames; 10px→12px on Family/Row group frames; 56px→64px on page-root gap) to spacing tokens
Typography page: rounded and bound 16 off-scale spacing values (6px→8px, 10px→12px) across type specimen row frames
Spacing page: rounded and bound 20 off-scale spacing values (6px→8px, 10px→12px) across spacing specimen frames
All four foundation pages (Color, Typography, Spacing, Layout) now have zero unbound spacing values

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Scoped desktop column grid to the 1200px content area — the 240px sidebar sits outside the grid
Reduced desktop margins from 80px to 24px (matching gutter width), giving wider usable columns
Updated Desktop diagram to show sidebar + columns in content area instead of a misleading full-viewport grid
Removed the separate Content Width section — sidebar layout is now shown directly in the Column Grid diagrams
Updated Desktop spec labels and Breakpoints table to reflect 24px margins throughout

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Redesigned Layout & Grid page to match the visual style of Color, Typography, and Spacing foundation pages
Added Column Grid section with three visual diagrams showing column structure at Desktop (12 cols), Tablet (8 cols), and Mobile (4 cols)
Added Breakpoints section with a comparative table showing viewport widths, column counts, margins, and gutters with proportional width indicators
Added Content Width section illustrating the 1200px max-width constraint with centered layout diagram
Replaced previous blank template frames (with invisible grid overlays) with rich visual documentation matching the foundation page standard

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Added Layout page between Spacing and the component section
Desktop template: 1440×900px frame with 240px sidebar placeholder and nested 1200px Content Area frame carrying a 12-column grid (24px gutters, 24px margins)
Tablet template: 768×1024px frame with 8-column grid (24px gutters, 24px margins)
Mobile template: 390×844px frame with 4-column grid (16px gutters, 16px margins)
Each template includes breakpoint labels, spec text, and pill chips below documenting columns/gutters/margins
Intro doc frame explains to designers that desktop work should go inside the Content Area frame, not the outer viewport frame

sections.label: TOKENS
bullets: Fixed spacing variable WEB code syntax: var(--spacing-1…20) → var(--spacing-xs/sm/md/lg/xl/2xl/3xl/4xl/5xl/6xl/7xl) to match actual CSS custom properties
Fixed feedback variable code syntax: var(--color-feedback-*) → var(--color-success-*/warning-*/error-*) to match CSS
Set Dark mode values on 6 existing feedback variables (success, success-bg, warning, warning-bg, error, error-bg)
Created 7 missing feedback variables: success-border, warning-border, error-border, info-bg, info-border, info-icon, info-text — each with Light and Dark mode values and correct code syntax
Updated 3 existing variables (success-text, warning-text, error-text) with correct Dark mode values and code syntax
Set scopes on all 16 feedback variables (FRAME_FILL/SHAPE_FILL for backgrounds, STROKE_COLOR for borders, SHAPE_FILL/TEXT_FILL for icons and text)

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Toast.css: updated `.toast` gap from `var(--spacing-sm)` (8px) to `var(--spacing-md)` (12px) to match Figma component itemSpacing

Toast.css: updated `.toast` padding from `12px var(--spacing-lg)` to `var(--spacing-lg) var(--spacing-md) var(--spacing-lg) var(--spacing-lg)` (16px top/bottom, asymmetric 16px/12px horizontal) to match Figma

sections.label: COMPONENTS
bullets: Audited all component nodes across every page — replaced every hardcoded fill, stroke, corner radius, padding, and gap with a bound variable
Input & Select (27 variants): itemSpacing bound to spacing/2
Nav Item: cornerRadius → radius/md; padding 8/12 → spacing/2/3; itemSpacing 10 → spacing/2; Badge cornerRadius → radius/lg; Badge padding 5 → spacing/1
Navbar: LogoMark → radius/md; Logo/UserRow padding → spacing/4; section padding → spacing/2/3; Avatar cornerRadius 16 → radius/full; itemSpacing 10 → spacing/2; itemSpacing 2 → spacing/1
Radio (4 variants): cornerRadius 9 → radius/full
Checkbox: Checkmark stroke bound to color/interactive/primary-fg; indeterminate Rectangle cornerRadius 1 → radius/none

Tabs: Tab cornerRadius → radius/md; padding 4 → spacing/1; padding 10 → spacing/3; Indicator cornerRadius 2 → radius/sm; TabGroup cornerRadius → radius/lg; padding 3 → spacing/1; itemSpacing 2 → spacing/1
Toast: padding 14 → spacing/4; padding 12 → spacing/3; itemSpacing 10 → spacing/3; StatusIcon cornerRadius → radius/lg; Content itemSpacing 2 → spacing/1
Icon: Shape stroke bound to color/text/default

sections.label: TOKENS
bullets: Set `color/interactive/primary-fg` Dark mode value to #1E1B4B — was aliased to white; dark mode needs dark text on the light-purple primary button
Set `color/interactive/primary-subtle` Dark mode value to #1E1B4B — was aliased to indigo/900 (#312E81); corrected to match CSS dark override for accessible contrast

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Added --shadow-focus and --shadow-focus-subtle tokens to tokens.css with dark mode overrides (indigo-400 glow instead of indigo-600). Removes the last hardcoded rgba focus colours from component CSS.
Applied --shadow-focus to Button, Checkbox, Toggle, Radio; --shadow-focus-subtle to Input and Select.
Added --color-surface-inverse: #F1F5F9 dark override — Toast and Tooltip now render as a light chip on the dark page (true inverse), instead of blending into the dark background.
Added --color-text-on-inverse: #0F172A dark override — dark text on the now-light inverse surface, 16.6:1 contrast.

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Added --color-interactive-primary-fg: #1E1B4B dark override in tokens.css — primary button and filled pill text is now dark on the light purple (#818CF8) dark-mode primary background, 5.1:1 contrast (was 2.8:1, white-on-light-purple).
Added --color-text-on-primary: #1E1B4B dark override — fixes NavItem badge text contrast on the primary interactive pill background.

Darkened --color-interactive-primary-subtle from #312E81 to #1E1B4B — Badge primary, Button secondary (hover), and NavItem active now achieve 5.1:1 contrast with #818CF8 text (was 3.6:1, failed WCAG AA).
Removed component-level [data-theme="dark"] .nav-item--active override from NavItem.css — now handled correctly at the token level.

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Added dark mode overrides for all status background, border, and icon tokens in tokens.css (--color-success-bg/border/icon, --color-warning-bg/border/icon, --color-error-bg/border/icon, --color-info-bg/border/icon); Alert, Badge (success/warning/error), and Button destructive now render on dark-appropriate backgrounds instead of light tinted surfaces.
Fixed --color-error-text dark override: was incorrectly set to #FEF2F2 (the light-mode error background). Corrected to #FCA5A5 (red-300), a readable text colour on dark error backgrounds.
Added --color-info-text dark override (#A5B4FC, indigo-300) to tokens.css.

Added [data-theme="dark"] .nav-item--active override in NavItem.css; active text now uses --color-interactive-primary-hover (#A5B4FC) giving 5.3:1 contrast against the dark subtle background (#312E81), up from 3.6:1 (which failed WCAG AA).

sections.label: COMPONENTS
bullets: 18 UI component sets updated — Alert, Avatar, Badge, Button, Card, Checkbox, Input, Modal, Nav Item, Navbar, Radio, Select, Spinner, Tab, TabGroup, Toast, Toggle, and Tooltip all show as modified
88 icon components on the Icon page show as updated — full icon library modified since the last baseline

sections.label: COMPONENTS
bullets: Renamed icon components on Icon page to match slug convention: "Up Arrow" → "Up-Arrow", "Down Arrow" → "Down-Arrow", "Star-Solid Full" → "Star-Solid-Full".

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Added --color-surface-inverse (#1E293B) and --color-text-on-inverse (#F8FAFC) semantic tokens to tokens.css for inverse-surface components (Toast, Tooltip).

Replaced hardcoded hex values in Toast.css, Tooltip.css, Avatar.css, Checkbox.css, Toggle.css, Button.css, NavItem.css with token references (--color-surface-inverse, --color-text-on-inverse, --color-text-on-primary, --color-*-icon, --radius-sm, --color-text-disabled).
Added helperText prop to Select props table in SelectPage.jsx and components.json.
Corrected NavItem icon prop type from ReactNode to string in components.json; updated description to reference icon slugs.
Updated llms.txt component count from 17 to 18.

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Added 9 Destructive button variants (Small/Medium/Large × Default/Hover/Disabled) to the Button component set, backed by new button/bg/destructive, button/text/destructive, and button/border/destructive tokens aliased to the error color scale. Created a dedicated Navbar page with the Navbar component moved off the Nav Item page.

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Fixed Alert body text never rendering (renamed internal description prop to message to match all demos and components.json). Added missing "With image" demo section to AvatarPage. Wired Tabs component with proper ARIA — aria-controls/id linking tabs to panel, tabIndex roving, and ArrowLeft/Right/Home/End keyboard navigation. Moved ScrollToTop definition below import block in App.jsx.

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Removed the non-functional "Get Started" and "View components" CTA buttons from the Intro page hero. Expanded the Installation page with a beginner developer guide — stack table (React 18 + Vite + vanilla CSS), run-locally steps, component import and usage pattern, annotated Badge anatomy example (JSX + CSS), and the three naming/styling conventions.

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Added a beginner-friendly README — what the system is built with (React + Vite + vanilla CSS tokens), how to run it locally, how to use a component, and an annotated component anatomy with conventions

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Completed the Accessibility + Guidelines rollout — added the sections to the remaining 12 component pages (Radio, Select, Toggle, Tabs, Toast, Alert, Avatar, Badge, Card, Spinner, Nav Item, Navbar)
Every one of the 17 component pages now has Accessibility notes and a Do / Don’t grid

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Added a reusable Guidelines docs component — an Accessibility list and a Do / Don’t grid
Applied Accessibility + Guidelines sections to the Button, Input, Checkbox, Modal, and Tooltip pages (first batch; remaining components to follow)

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Added components.json — machine-readable manifest of all 17 components (import path, props, Figma node id, doc URL)
Added tokens.json — all design tokens in W3C DTCG format (light values; dark in tokens.css)
Added public/llms.txt — LLM-friendly index of the docs and machine-readable files; linked from AGENTS.md

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Removed the Code Connect scaffolding (figma.config.json, Button.figma.tsx) — publishing requires an Organization/Enterprise plan; AGENTS.md + TOKENS.md remain the manual Figma→code reference

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Added AGENTS.md — cold-start orientation for developers and AI agents (structure, token rules, component → Figma node-id map, changelog automation)
Added TOKENS.md — authoritative Figma-variable ↔ CSS-variable mapping, including the names that diverge (bg/muted → surface-raised, feedback/* → status tokens)
Set up Code Connect — figma.config.json + Button.figma.tsx reference mapping (Figma Style/Size/State variants → React props)

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Token values corrected to match Figma — text-muted #64748B, border-focus #6366F1, and feedback text colors to the -900 steps (success #064E3B, warning #78350F, error #7F1D1D), incl. dark-mode variants
Primitive palette aligned to Figma — removed the unused green scale; emerald/amber now 50/400/500/900 and red 50/500/600/900 (tokens.css + Colors page)
Added the Navbar component — sidebar with brand, grouped nav sections, and a user row — plus its docs page, route, and nav entry
Added the missing Label/Large Underline text style to the Typography page (now 16 styles)

sections.label: TOKENS
bullets: Changed the alert/radius token — now resolves to 4px (aliases radius/sm); the Alert component’s corner radius updates to match

sections.label: FIXES
bullets: Removed the Figma token auto-sync tooling — deleted scripts/sync-figma-tokens.mjs, style-dictionary/config.mjs, and the related npm scripts and devDependency (the Variables REST API requires an Enterprise plan)
Updated docs to match — dropped the “Syncing tokens from Figma” section on the Installation page and revised the Tokens page and tokens.css to describe tokens as maintained directly in tokens.css

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Added a new Icons documentation page (/components/icons) listing all 88 icons from the Icon page, exported as inline SVG using fill=currentColor
Icons page supports search-by-name and click-to-copy slug; added an Icons entry to the General nav group (src/nav.js, src/App.jsx)
Corrected icon-source labels in src/components/ui/icons.js and IconPage.jsx from “Acme Corp DS” to “Claude Design System”

sections.label: ACCESSIBILITY
bullets: Updated 5 Dark mode Color variables to meet WCAG AA contrast (4.5:1 minimum)
Fixed badge/text/success, warning, error — were hardcoded, now alias Color collection
Added color/feedback/success-text, warning-text, error-text tokens for tonal badge text
Fixed badge/border/default — was same color as fill (invisible), now uses color/border/strong
Fixed badge/border/error — was resolving to near-white ring in dark mode, now matches fill

sections.label: TOKENS
bullets: All 45 Color and Spacing variables confirmed with correct CSS var() code syntax

sections.label: DOCUMENTATION
bullets: Renamed generic node names (Frame 1, Frame 2) in legend components to LegendItem_Current, LegendItem_Previous

sections.label: FOUNDATIONS
bullets: 5 variable collections: Primitives, Color (Light/Dark), Spacing, Typography, Components
27 Color tokens with Light and Dark mode, all aliased to Primitives
21 Spacing tokens on a 4px grid (spacing/1 through spacing/24)
38 Typography tokens (font family, size, weight, line height, tracking)
5 Shadow effect styles (xs → xl)
16 text styles across Display, Heading, Body, Label, and Code scales

sections.label: COMPONENTS
bullets: 229 components across 15 pages: Alert, Avatar, Badge, Button, Card, Checkbox, Input, Modal, Nav Item, Radio, Select, Spinner, Tabs, Toast, Toggle, Tooltip
88 icons on a dedicated Icon page
All component fills, strokes, padding, and radii bound to semantic tokens
Components collection with 154 component-level tokens

sections.label: SCREENS
bullets: Test screens page with Dashboard (Overview) in Light and Dark mode
